creator: usenet@ulrich-grey.de
text:
Ports Revision 382670
##
And the following internal features:
  pthread:       no (can't link with -lpthread or -pthread)
  gtk-doc:       no
  gcov support:  no
  symbol-lookup: no (requires bfd)
  test surfaces: no (disabled, use --enable-test-surfaces to enable)
  ps testing:    no (requires libspectre)
  pdf testing:   no (requires poppler-glib >= 0.17.4)
  svg testing:   no (requires librsvg-2.0 >= 2.35.0)
...
===>  Building for cairo-1.12.18_1,2
...
